間間唔同
P 記deals 上年十月中in, 十一月四收offer
D 記就partner in完，應該要半個月
E記(financial advisory only)就見完2日收
K記就唔好玩啦 減薪仲請咩人（joke, 全rp咁濟）

financial advisory 做嘜變左Corp fin
fa 包好多野 m&a , Corp fin, valuation, restructuring, forensic
risk advisory又係第二樣野黎

Ey transact service(valuation & business model)係咪好難入
另外dse result係咪都好重要

financial advisory 做嘜變左Corp fin
fa 包好多野 m&a , Corp fin, valuation, restructuring, forensic
risk advisory又係第二樣野黎

間間唔同 名都唔同 例如e記financial advisory唔係做transaction related ge advisory,
D記financial service advisory 又包埋transaction related advisory + forensic
